This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation."},"item_number":{"type":["number","string"],"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). 2026-03-31T06:40:34.5376927Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-31T06:40:19.730437122Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57613,\"title\":\"Management generator emits `new AbstractData()` for resources with discriminated (abstract) data types\",\"body\":\"## Problem\\n\\nWhen a resource uses `DiscriminatedExtensionResource` (or any pattern that makes the resource data type abstract via `@discriminator`), the generated `Resource.Serialization.cs` creates a `DataDeserializationInstance` that tries to instantiate the abstract data type directly:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Generated in HciEdgeDeviceResource.Serialization.cs\\nprivate static IJsonModel DataDeserializationInstance\\n    =\\u0026gt; s_dataDeserializationInstance ??= new Hci.HciEdgeDeviceData();\\n//                                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\\n//                                       CS0144: Cannot create an instance of the abstract type\\n```\\n\\nSince `HciEdgeDeviceData` is abstract (generated from a `@discriminator`-decorated model), this produces **CS0144** at compile time.\\n\\n## Affected Types (real-world example)\\n\\nIn the **Azure.ResourceManager.Hci** SDK (branch `migrate-hci-to-typespec`):\\n\\n| Resource | Abstract Data Type | Error Location |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `HciEdgeDeviceResource` | `HciEdgeDeviceData` | `HciEdgeDeviceResource.Serialization.cs:19` |\\n| `EdgeDeviceJobResource` | `EdgeDeviceJobData` | `EdgeDeviceJobResource.Serialization.cs:19` |\\n\\nBoth data types are abstract because their TypeSpec models use `DiscriminatedExtensionResource`:\\n\\n```typespec\\n// EdgeDevice.tsp\\n@extensionResource\\nmodel EdgeDevice\\n  is Azure.ResourceManager.Legacy.DiscriminatedExtensionResource { ... }\\n\\n// EdgeDeviceJob.tsp\\n@extensionResource\\n@parentResource(EdgeDevice)\\nmodel EdgeDeviceJob\\n  is Azure.ResourceManager.Legacy.DiscriminatedExtensionResource { ... }\\n```\\n\\n## Minimal Repro\\n\\nA minimal TypeSpec test file has been added to the mgmt test project at `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/TestProjects/Local/Mgmt-TypeSpec/discriminatedextensionresource.tsp`:\\n\\n```typespec\\n@extensionResource\\nmodel PolyDevice\\n  is Azure.ResourceManager.Legacy.DiscriminatedExtensionResource {\\n  ...ResourceNameParameter\\u0026lt;\\n    Resource = PolyDevice,\\n    KeyName = \\u0026#34;deviceName\\u0026#34;,\\n    SegmentName = \\u0026#34;polyDevices\\u0026#34;,\\n    NamePattern = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;\\n  \\u0026gt;;\\n}\\n\\nunion PolyDeviceKind {\\n  string,\\n  TypeA: \\u0026#34;TypeA\\u0026#34;,\\n}\\n\\nmodel TypeAPolyDevice extends PolyDevice {\\n  kind: PolyDeviceKind.TypeA;\\n  properties: TypeAPolyDeviceProperties;\\n}\\n\\nmodel TypeAPolyDeviceProperties {\\n  description?: string;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe generator should recognize that the resource data type is abstract and either:\\n1. Use a deserialization factory method that dispatches based on the discriminator property, or\\n2. Use one of the concrete derived types for the `DataDeserializationInstance`\\n\\n## Labels\\n\\nMgmt, CodeGen\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57613\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"assignees\":[\"live1206\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-31T06:38:00Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-31T06:39:51Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
